Name: Brandon Diaz
Short Description of Project: FormMatch is an AI-powered movement intelligence platform that analyzes exercise form in real time using computer vision and neural networks. Built with TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe, the system detects movement patterns, scores technique, and delivers instant feedback — making expert-level coaching accessible to any athlete. Currently in active development under FormMatch LLC, with boxing as our first sport-specific module.
